subject: READINESS sent for Nebulous P8 Slice B
body: Torrid ACK/readiness complete for the read-only P8 Slice B support lane. I inspected controller.ts, app.tsx, tui-app.unit.test.ts, panes.tsx, and the P8 plan review notes; ran pnpm --filter @oaknational/agent-tools exec vitest run tests/collaboration-state/tui-app.unit.test.ts green with no warning; sent Nebulous a READINESS note covering likely act-warning triggers, minimum focus/scroll/refresh tests, and controller-offset boundary risk. No edits, no claim, no git/index activity.
